## Description

Please include a summary of the change, the motivation behind it, and any relevant context. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Closes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] ⚙️ Chore / Refactor / Formatting (code cleanup, tool updates, build tweaks)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce. Please also list any relevant details for your test configuration.

- **Test environment:** (e.g., Windows 11, Tauri dev build, React 19)
- **Test case A:** Describe step-by-step how to verify the fix/feature.
- **Test case B:** Describe additional edge cases or integration checks.

## Screenshots / Screen Recordings (if applicable)

*Add screenshots, mockups, or screen recordings showing visual changes or flow modifications (especially for UI/UX updates).*

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] My changes generate no new typescript compiler (`tsc`) errors or warnings
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (like README or inline guides)
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new security vulnerabilities or store credentials unsafely
- [ ] I have verified that the Tauri application compiles and runs successfully with `bun run tauri build` or `bun run tauri dev`
- [ ] I have updated the changelog (if applicable)
